title: Spanish-Style Goose Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic stir fry dish made with Spanish-inspired spices and crispy goose meat. This recipe is perfect for a quick and satisfying dinner.
instructions: 1. Heat the floral oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the goose breast to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
3. Remove the goose from the skillet and set aside to rest.
4. In the same skillet, add the spanish smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Add the green onion to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until softened.
6. Slice the rested goose breast into thin strips and add to the skillet.
7. Stir to combine the goose and onion mixture, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
8. Serve the Spanish-Style Goose Stir Fry hot and enjoy!
